🛠️ Internal Tools & Admin Panels

Build internal dashboards and admin UIs — open source alternatives to Retool and Bubble.

Popular SaaS in this category

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Alternatives to Retool

Build internal admin panels and tools fast.

4 alternatives

Alternatives to Airtable

Spreadsheet-database hybrid with rich field types and views.

3 alternatives
Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Appsmith

Open source Retool alternative for internal admin panels.

License: Apache-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

ToolJet

Open source low-code builder for internal tools.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Budibase

Open source internal tool platform with built-in database.

License: GPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

NocoDB

Open source Airtable alternative — turn any DB into a spreadsheet UI.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Baserow

Self-hosted open source Airtable alternative with workspaces.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Teable

Postgres-backed Airtable alternative.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Other categories you might like

📏 Online Whiteboards & Diagramming

Virtual whiteboards for workshops, retros and diagrams — open source alternatives to Miro, Mural and InVision Freehand.

📹 Screen Recording & Video Capture

Record screens, make tutorials and share async videos — open source alternatives to Loom, Camtasia and Bandicam.

✍️ Writing & Grammar Tools

Spell and grammar checkers, prose linters and style helpers — open source alternatives to Grammarly and Hemingway.

OpenInstead — open source alternatives to the SaaS you already use. Updated May 2026.
Maintained by Alexandru Drăghici in Bucharest, Romania. Reach out: contact@openinstead.dev.
Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
